    Description

    use BpmnModelConstants.CAMUNDA_NS

    use SpringBootProcessEngineLogger
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi.BusinessProcess.getAndClearVariableCache()
    use BusinessProcess.getAndClearCachedVariableMap() instead
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi.BusinessProcess.getAndClearVariableLocalCache()
    use BusinessProcess.getAndClearCachedLocalVariableMap() instead
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi.BusinessProcess.getVariableCache()
    use BusinessProcess.getCachedVariableMap() instead
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi.BusinessProcess.getVariableLocalCache()
    use BusinessProcess.getCachedLocalVariableMap() instead
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi.jsf.TaskForm.startProcessInstanceByIdForm(String, String)
    use TaskForm.startProcessInstanceByIdForm() instead
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi.jsf.TaskForm.startProcessInstanceByKeyForm(String, String)
    use TaskForm.startProcessInstanceByKeyForm() instead
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi.jsf.TaskForm.startTask(String, String)
    use TaskForm.startTaskForm() instead
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.AuthorizationExceptionDto.getPermissionName()
    Use AuthorizationExceptionDto.getMissingAuthorizations() to get the name of the violated permission of the MissingAuthorizationDto(s). This method will be removed in future version.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.AuthorizationExceptionDto.getResourceId()
    Use AuthorizationExceptionDto.getMissingAuthorizations() to get the id of the resource of the MissingAuthorizationDto(s). This method will be removed in future version.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.AuthorizationExceptionDto.getResourceName()
    Use AuthorizationExceptionDto.getMissingAuthorizations() to get the name of the resource of the MissingAuthorizationDto(s). This method will be removed in future version.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.AuthorizationExceptionDto.setPermissionName(String)
    Use AuthorizationExceptionDto.setMissingAuthorizations(List)} to set the the MissingAuthorizationDto(s). This method will be removed in future version.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.AuthorizationExceptionDto.setResourceId(String)
    Use AuthorizationExceptionDto.setMissingAuthorizations(List)} to set the the MissingAuthorizationDto(s). This method will be removed in future version.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.AuthorizationExceptionDto.setResourceName(String)
    Use AuthorizationExceptionDto.setMissingAuthorizations(List)} to set the the MissingAuthorizationDto(s). This method will be removed in future version.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.repository.CaseDefinitionQueryDto.setLatest(Boolean)
    use CaseDefinitionQueryDto.setLatestVersion(Boolean)
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.repository.ProcessDefinitionQueryDto.setLatest(Boolean)
    use ProcessDefinitionQueryDto.setLatestVersion(Boolean)
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.repository.ProcessDefinitionQueryDto.setVer(Integer)
    use ProcessDefinitionQueryDto.setVersion(Integer)
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.runtime.TransitionInstanceDto.getTargetActivityId()
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.task.FormDto.getCamundaFormRef()
    Use FormDto.getCamundaFormRef() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.task.TaskDto.getCamundaFormRef()
    Use TaskDto.getFluxnovaFormRef() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.task.TaskQueryDto.setCreated(Date)
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.task.TaskQueryDto.setDue(Date)
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.task.TaskQueryDto.setFollowUp(Date)
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.hal.task.HalTask.getCamundaFormRef()
    Use HalTask.getFluxnovaFormRef() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.TelemetryRestService.configureTelemetry(TelemetryConfigurationDto)
    The sending telemetry feature is removed. Please remove the endpoint usages as they are no longer needed.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.TelemetryRestService.getTelemetryConfiguration()
    The sending telemetry feature is removed. Please remove the endpoint usages as they are no longer needed.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.builder.AbstractBaseElementBuilder.createBpmnEdge(SequenceFlow)
    use AbstractBaseElementBuilder.createEdge(BaseElement) instead
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.builder.AbstractCallActivityBuilder.fluxnovaAsync()
    use camundaAsyncBefore() instead. Sets the camunda async attribute to true.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.builder.AbstractCallActivityBuilder.fluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use camundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead Sets the camunda async attribute.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.builder.AbstractStartEventBuilder.fluxnovaAsync()
    use camundaAsyncBefore() instead. Sets the camunda async attribute to true.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.builder.AbstractStartEventBuilder.fluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use camundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead. Sets the camunda async attribute.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.builder.AbstractSubProcessBuilder.fluxnovaAsync()
    use camundaAsyncBefore() instead. Sets the camunda async attribute to true.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.builder.AbstractSubProcessBuilder.fluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use camundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead. Sets the camunda async attribute.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.builder.AbstractTaskBuilder.fluxnovaAsync()
    use camundaAsyncBefore() instead. Sets the camunda async attribute to true.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.builder.AbstractTaskBuilder.fluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use camundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead. Sets the camunda async attribute.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.CallActivityImpl.isFluxnovaAsync()
    use isCamundaAsyncBefore() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.CallActivityImpl.setFluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use setCamundaAsyncBefore() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.ParallelGatewayImpl.isFluxnovaAsync()
    use isCamundaAsyncBefore() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.ParallelGatewayImpl.setFluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use setCamundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.StartEventImpl.isFluxnovaAsync()
    use isCamundaAsyncBefore() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.StartEventImpl.setFluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use setCamundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.SubProcessImpl.isFluxnovaAsync()
    use isCamundaAsyncBefore() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.SubProcessImpl.setFluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use setCamundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.TaskImpl.isFluxnovaAsync()
    use isCamundaAsyncBefore() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.TaskImpl.setFluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use setCamundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.CallActivity.isFluxnovaAsync()
    use isCamundaAsyncBefore() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.CallActivity.setFluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use setCamundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.ParallelGateway.isFluxnovaAsync()
    use isCamundaAsyncBefore() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.ParallelGateway.setFluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use setCamundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead.

    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.Process.setFluxnovaHistoryTimeToLive(Integer)
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.StartEvent.isFluxnovaAsync()
    use isCamundaAsyncBefore() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.StartEvent.setFluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use setCamundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.SubProcess.isFluxnovaAsync()
    use isCamundaAsyncBefore() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.SubProcess.setFluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use setCamundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.Task.isFluxnovaAsync()
    use isCamundaAsyncBefore() instead.
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.Task.setFluxnovaAsync(boolean)
    use setCamundaAsyncBefore(isCamundaAsyncBefore) instead;

  • Deprecated Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.spring.SpringTransactionInterceptor(PlatformTransactionManager, int)
    use the SpringTransactionInterceptor(PlatformTransactionManager, int, ProcessEngineConfigurationImpl) constructor to ensure that concurrency conflicts that occur on transaction commit are detected and handled in all cases
